_meta.purpose: Phase 0 / Task 31 baseline capture. Copy this file to '<role>.before.json' (and later '<role>.after.json') and fill in real measured numbers. No perf change in this spec ships without a before/after pair (tasks.md top rule).

environment.target: deployed app (Vercel preview or prod) — NOT local dev; numbers must reflect the real network + free-tier Supabase

_runbook: 1. CLIENT (per role: student, teacher, coordinator, admin, parent): sign in, open DevTools > Network, hard-reload the dashboard. Record requestCountOnMount (XHR/fetch count to settle), and from the Performance/Lighthouse panel LCP and INP. Note the cold-nav waterfall (which requests are serial vs parallel).

2. BUNDLE: run `npm run analyze` (cross-env ANALYZE=true vite build) -> read the rollup visualizer output for initial gzipped chunk sizes; cross-check audit/baselines/bundle.json. Run `npm run lighthouse` (lhci) for Performance/FCP/LCP/TBT.

3. DB: Supabase Dashboard > Reports/Database > Query Performance -> record p50/p95 per hot endpoint (the get_<role>_dashboard RPCs + any remaining section queries). Run `EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS)` per dashboard query and paste mean_exec_time + shared-buffer hits.
4. Save as audit/baselines/ux-perf/<role>.before.json. After shipping a perf change, re-capture as <role>.after.json and diff. This is Task 41 (re-measure) input.
5. Existing tooling to reuse (do NOT reimplement): npm run analyze, npm run lighthouse, scripts/validate-performance-targets.sh, performance-budget.config.ts, lighthouserc.cjs.

bundle.notes: from npm run analyze + npm run lighthouse
